name: dieUnbalanced
title: Unbalanced Die
description: A playing die someone tried to load to his advantage, but didn't do a very good job.

name: die_Matematikova
title: Mathematician's Die
description: A die loaded based on the work of a forgotten mathematician. It may be better suited to solving equations than playing dice.

name: dieSkull
title: Hugo's Die
description: A die of the most loyal regular at the Hole. It bears his likeness.

name: dieLucky
title: Lucky Die
description: When fortune smiles on you, smile back. Otherwise you'll look suspicious.

name: die_Vozkova
title: Wagoner's Die
description: According to legend, this die belonged to the famous Roman chrioteer Arnuldus, whose tactics consisted of tiring his opponents or lulling them to sleep.

name: zachranaPtacka_die_sad_sergeant
title: Sad Greaser's Die
description: A blue die mirroring the sadness of its original owner.

name: die_Gamblerova_good
title: Cautious cheater's die
description: A die modified by an expert. It is precisely loaded, but also inconspicuous.

name: die_Antiocha
title: Saint Antiochus' die
description: The Saint Antiochus' die always rolls a 3. Not 2. And especially not 4.

name: dieEven
title: Even die
description: A die loaded in favour of even numbers.

name: dieTeeth_c
title: Wisdom tooth die
description: A playing die made from a wisdom tooth.

name: dieStripping
title: Strip die
description: Legend has it this die will help you undress many a wench.

name: dieOdd
title: Odd die
description: A die loaded to favour odd numbers. Most of the time.

name: dieHolyTrinity
title: Holy Trinity die
description: A consecrated die commemorating the Holy Trinity, especially by rolling threes.

name: dieTeeth_b
title: Premolar die
description: A playing die made from a premolar tooth.

name: die_Kralova
title: King's die
description: An annointed head has no need of a loaded die, since he is always right and can never lose.

name: dieAdversity
title: Unlucky die
description: Sometimes Lady Luck is on your side, sometimes she isn't. With this die, she most likely isn't.

name: dieNormal
title: Ordinary die
description: An ordinary playing die.

name: die_aranka
title: Aranka's die
description: Aranka gave me this die to make it easier for me to play against her husband.

name: die_Tengri
title: Tengri's Dice
description: This one appeared to me after I won on all of Tengri’s tracks. A little token of my tremendous success, perhaps?

name: die_Ci
title: Ci die
description: The second in the line of the demonic dice, she likes to get lost, but when she's with her sisters she's very strong.

name: die_Lu
title: Lu die
description: The first of the line of demonic dice.

name: zachranaPtacka_die_trojak
title: Three die
description: For some reason, this die usually rolls a three. Why?

name: problemovejParchant_pearlDice
title: Mother-of-pearl die
description: A rare pink mother-of-pearl die. Said to bring luck in games, but misfortune in love.

name: dieKingdomCome
title: Heavenly Kingdom die
description: A miraculous playing die, sent down from the Heavenly Kingdom to earth.

name: zachranaPtacka_die_mud
title: Grimy die
description: One could say it will get you out of the frying pan into the fire. And sometimes it will let you stew in your own juice.

name: die_Gamblerova_bad
title: Lousy gambler's die
description: A shoddy loaded die. It's quite noticably unbalanced.

name: zachranaPtacka_die_klobas
title: Greasy die
description: A more reliable die than a normal one, but it cannot be relied on for everything.

name: dieDevil
title: Devil's head die
description: A die that feels hot to the touch. In place of a one it has a devil's head, which is not something folk like to gaye upon…

name: dieBalanced
title: Shrinking die
description: A very lightly loaded die. One can barely differentiate it from an ordinary die.

name: dieUnlucky
title: Die of misfortune
description: They say that when it rains, it pours. But if you play with this die, the only thing pouring will be your tears.

name: die_e
title: Fer die
description: The third and last in the line of demonic dice.

name: die_sarlatan
title: St. Stephen's die
description: A die blessed by St. Stephen, guaranteeing favourable numbers in the game and protection from loose stones.

name: die_Kolacova
title: Pie die
description: Doesn't look particularly tasty, but it's well balanced towards lower numbers.

name: dieFavourable
title: Favourable die
description: A playing die that brings luck more often than you'd expect.

name: dieCursed
title: Monk's Die
description: No one knows for sure whether it was blessed by a holy man or just spat on by a drunken monk. Either way, the die rolls... sort of. It's said to bring good luck to honest people. To scoundrels, it brings foolish dreams and a tendency to trip over things that weren't there before. Or maybe it's the other way around.

name: zikmunduvTabor_grozavGotchaDie
title: Grozav's lucky die
description: It is actually not all that lucky, but don't tell anyone!

name: dieTeeth_a
title: Molar die
description: A die made out of a molar tooth. It's probably better not to know who it came from.

name: prepadeni_dieBarn
title: Weighted die
description: A mysterious playing die found in a ruined house. Suspiciously, it tends to land on 1.

name: dieBlue
title: Painted die
description: One of the dice coloured using modern techniques that hide the attempt to load it.

name: malir_die_r
title: Painter's die R
description: Painter Voyta's red-painted die.

name: malir_die_g
title: Painter's die G
description: Painter Voyta's green-painted die.

name: malir_die_b
title: Painter's die B
description: Painter Voyta's blue-painted die.
